basicDetails.schemeName: Supply of School Uniform and Tie belt to SC/ST Boys/ Girls Students of Std I to VIII
basicDetails.schemeShortTitle: SUPPLY OF SCHOOL UNIFORM, TIE BELT

state.label: Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu

references.title: Supply Of School Uniform And Tie Belt To SC/ST Boys/ All Girls Students Of Std I To VIII

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: Provision of a complete school uniform (shirt, pants, skirt tie, belt) to SC/ ST Boys and all General Girls of classes I to VIII studying in government schools. Standardized uniform scheme to promote discipline, removing social distinctions based on attire.
schemeContent.benefits_md: 1. Fosters a sense of identity, equality and discipline among students. 2. Significantly reduces school absenteeism and improves performance by eliminating the financial barrier of purchasing clothes. 3. Promotes regular school attendance by supporting foundational needs
schemeContent.briefDescription: Supply of School Uniform and Tie belt to SC/ST Boys/ Girls Students of Std I to VIII studying in Govt Schools

children.text: Provision of a complete school uniform (shirt, pants, skirt tie, belt) to  SC/ ST Boys and all General Girls of classes I to VIII studying in government schools. Standardized uniform scheme to promote discipline, removing social distinctions based on attire.
1. Fosters a sense of identity, equality and discipline among students.
2. Significantly reduces school absenteeism and improves performance by eliminating the financial barrier of purchasing clothes.
3. Promotes regular school attendance by supporting foundational needs
Eligible students enrolled in government schools are automatically covered under the scheme.

applicationProcess.process_md: 1. No separate application is required. 1. Eligible students enrolled in government schools are automatically covered under the scheme.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The applicant should be a student. 2. The applicant should be studying in class 1st to 8th. 3. The applicant should be studying in a government school in UT of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu.

children.text: 1.	The applicant should be a student.
2.	The applicant should be studying in class 1st to 8th.
3.	The applicant should be studying in a government school in UT of Dadra & Nagar Haveli and Daman & Diu.
